current_sprint.sprint_name: Lab-Technician Portal — Test Queue, Result Submission, PDF Upload, Submit Test
current_sprint.goal: Build all lab-technician pages under (lab-technician)/lab-technician/ — dashboard, queue list, test detail + result form, PDF upload, submit-new-test form

known_issues: jose@6 CompressionStream/DecompressionStream Edge Runtime warnings on build — benign, deferred to FE-S9
Sidebar nav links hardcoded to /fr/ locale — next-intl useRouter migration in FE-S9
QR verify page uses fetch() directly — typed client migration in FE-S8 after codegen
api-client paths/components/operations not exported from types.gen.ts — pre-existing, full codegen in FE-S8
cooperative_id in session requires Keycloak custom claim configured — works in prod, returns null in dev without Keycloak
windows_fixes: postcss.config.js (CJS) instead of .mjs — ESM Windows path bug
output: 'standalone' conditioned on NEXT_OUTPUT env — Windows symlink EPERM
shadcn v4 globals.css rewritten for Tailwind v3 (HSL vars instead of oklch/@import)
button.tsx replaced — shadcn v4 uses @base-ui/react, replaced with plain HTML button

backlog_status.note: FE-S1 through FE-S6 complete. Backend v1 done. Next: FE-S7 (certification-body portal).

next_actions: Run /plan for FE-S7 (certification-body portal — pending requests list, grant/deny decisions, certificate view, 13 SP)
FE-S7 scope: all pages under (certification-body)/certification-body/ route group — requests list, request detail + grant/deny forms, certificate view
decisions_made_this_session: FE-S6 ResultForm: dynamic fields from labTestParameters — numeric inputs for quantitative params, select for enum params (values array)
canSubmitResult guard: status === 'submitted' || 'in_progress' AND !result — prevents double-filing
PDF upload uses server action proxy (uploadReport) with raw fetch + getAccessToken — avoids exposing Bearer token to client
UploadForm always shown when reportFileName is null (regardless of test status) — PDF can be uploaded anytime
productType lookup: GET /product-types?limit=100 then find by code — no by-code endpoint exists on backend
FE-S5 ReportForm radio uses value='true'/'false' strings — FormData.get() cast to boolean via === 'true' comparison
Inspector batches/products are read-only deep-links from inspection detail — no list pages for inspector
